title: Daoist Canon: Inner Alchemy of Wei Boyang (Section 7)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Inner Alchemy of Wei Boyang
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Inner Alchemy of Wei Boyang

translation.text: From the Inner Alchemy of Wei Boyang of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
